name: express-service-solid
description: Well-equipped Express service (git-initialized for T1 coverage) — expect broad passes incl. vcs_cli and doc_freshness; T2 criteria skip without GitHub. Parity reference for Factory's public Express report shape.

files.README.md:
# Billing API

An Express service that issues and reconciles invoices.

## Getting started

```bash
npm install
npm test
```

## Architecture

Routes live in `src/routes`, business logic in `src/services`, and persistence in `src/db`.
All handlers are thin; validation happens at the route boundary.

## Configuration

Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in the database URL and API keys.
files.AGENTS.md:
# Agent briefing

## Build & test

- `npm test` runs the unit suite; `npm run lint` runs eslint.

## Conventions

- Routes thin, services own logic. TypeScript strict mode is on.
files.openapi.yaml:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Billing API
  version: 1.0.0
paths: {}
files.SECURITY.md:
# Security policy

Report vulnerabilities to security@example.com.
files..github/dependabot.yml:
version: 2
updates:
  - package-ecosystem: npm
    directory: /
    schedule:
      interval: weekly
files..github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: CI
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - run: npm ci && npm test
files..github/workflows/codeql.yml:
name: CodeQL
on: [push]
jobs:
  analyze:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
